creator: marquis@roble.com
text:
> I have just tried with my 7.0-CURRENT (less v406) with no
> problem, does this happen *only* with less versions prior to,
> and not including 406?

Xin,

According to the application developer, Mark Nudelman, "This was
fixed in version 406".

> If that's the case I think 6.3-RELEASE (6-STABLE) won't have
> this problem, because we have MFC'ed v406 back to RELENG_6 some
> weeks ago.

Just cvsup'ed, to RELENG_6, and it has been fixed in base there.
Thanks!

Roger Marquis
